ab: Itini i tosa patek tosa polo’ ira ko tosa a mihecaan i, mikayki ko sifo to sakacipinang no tireng no Yin-cu-min a manga’ay micidek to ngangan no finacadan a kayki.
ch: 在2022年，政府召開了原住民身分證可單列族名會議。
en: In 2022, the government announced that indigenous identification cards can include tribal names separately.

ab: Milicay kako to matenesay misi’ayaway to sifo a milongoc to sakacipinang no tireng “micidek to ngangan no finacadan” a kapah no niyaro’ ci Foting Mayaw.
ch: 我訪問了長期向政府爭取身分證「單列族名」的部落青年 Foting Mayaw。
en: I interviewed Foting Mayaw, a young tribal member who has long been advocating for the inclusion of tribal names on identification cards.

ab: Masasowal to kami a tayra i loma’ ningra malalicay cingraan toni a pa’aliwacan.
ch: 我們約定好這個假日到他家訪問他。
en: We had arranged to visit his home this holiday for the interview.

ab: Malalicay ho i, pasifana’en ningra kako to na icowaay ko lalengawan no ngangan ningra, pasifana’en ningra kako to paro no loma’ ningra, o niyaro’ ningra.
ch: 在訪問的過程中，他向我介紹了他的名字的由來，他也帶我認識了他的家人、他的部落。
en: During the interview, he introduced to me the origin of his name and also introduced me to his family and tribe.

ab: Licay han ako cingraan ano pacici han a mifalic to ngangan, tati’ih ko katelangay a pasingsi hayda?
ch: 我問他為什麼堅持要改名，舊的登記方式不好嗎?
en: I asked him why he insisted on changing his name. Wasn’t the old registration method sufficient?

ab: Sowal saan cingra i takowanan, nawhani o tilid no holam caay ka polita a pakafana’ to ngangan ningra, maceli’ ho no roma a tamdaw cingraan ci Fo先生 sanay, orasaka ira to ko adihayay a tatawaen masadak.
ch: 他對我說，因為用中文字並不能準確的傳達他的名字，其他人還會叫他「福先生」，也因此鬧出不少笑話。
en: He told me that using Chinese characters could not accurately convey his name, and others would still call him \"Fu Xian Sheng,\" which resulted in many jokes being made.

ab: Sowal sa ci Foting Mayaw, “o tilid no sowal no Yin-cu-min a ngangan i, o tadaso’elinay a ngangan no mita. O ngangan no mako i, o citodongay to finacadan no mita, laloma’an no mita, pinangan no tireng no mita, nanay ira ko ’aloman a ’aloman ko finawlan manga’ay patatikol to ngangan no niyah.”
ch: Foting Mayaw說：「原住民語書寫的名字，才是我們真正的名字。我的名字，代表了我們的族群、我們的家族、我們的身分，希望能有更多族人恢復自己的名字。」
en: Foting Mayaw said, \"The names written in indigenous languages are our true names. My name represents our ethnic group, our family, our identity. I hope more fellow tribespeople can reclaim their own names.\"
